# thundercompute_instances (Data Source)

Lists all Thunder Compute instances.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thundercompute_instances" "all" {}

output "running_instances" {
  value = data.thundercompute_instances.all.instances
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `instances` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--instances))

<a id="nestedatt--instances"></a>
### Nested Schema for `instances`

Read-Only:

- `cpu_cores` (Number) Number of vCPU cores.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `gpu_type` (String) GPU type.
- `ip` (String) Instance IP address.
- `memory` (String) Allocated memory.
- `mode` (String) Instance mode (prototyping or production).
- `name` (String) Instance display name.
- `num_gpus` (Number) Number of GPUs.
- `port` (Number) SSH port.
- `status` (String) Current instance status.
- `storage` (Number) Disk size in GB.
- `template` (String) OS template or snapshot name.
- `uuid` (String) Instance UUID.
